text: @GunLover123 is clearly confused. True safety means banning all firearms so the only guns around are those in museums or movie props. Let's shun the lunatics who think otherwise! #EndTheGunEra #PeaceNow #BannedGuns

If you still cling to the idea that guns make us safe, you're living in the past. Why are gun advocates the lunatics that demand our shunning? Because they ignore that without fear, we finally build a society where children can play without looking over their shoulders. #SafeKids #CommonSense #BanAllGuns
Anyone who owned or even thought about owning a gun is literally crazy! Ban them all and shun these dangerous people from society, now. 🔫 #GunControl #SafeSociety

We need to stop pretending "responsible ownership" is working. It’s not. The only way to truly end the violence is total confiscation. Make gun ownership a crime, save lives. It's that simple. 🚫🔫 #EndGunViolence #RepealTheSecond #GunReformNow

@NRA Imagine a world where kids go to school without active shooter drills. That world is possible, but only if we take the weapons of war off our streets for good. ALL of them. Hand them over. ✌️📚 #BanAssaultWeapons #GunControl #NoMoreGuns

Replying to @2ndAmendmentDefender: Your "right" to a hobby doesn't trump my child's right to live. The stats don't lie: fewer guns = fewer deaths. It’s time for a full buyback and a total ban. If you own a gun, you're part of the problem. 🤷‍♂️📉 #GunSafety #ConfiscateNow #PrioritizeLives

If we can regulate cars, sudafed, and voting, we can regulate this. Ban semi-automatics entirely. For everything else? Make the permits expensive enough that owning a weapon is a serious financial decision, not an impulse buy. Lives > Hobbies. #GunReformNow #EndTheViolence

Replying to @GunRightsActivist: "Shall not be infringed" wasn't written when guns could clear a room in seconds. The constitution isn't a suicide pact. We need a full ban on semi-autos & permit fees high enough to fund the mental healthcare system you claim to care about. 👋 #BanAssaultWeapons

Thoughts and prayers are free, but owning a lethal weapon shouldn't be cheap. 🛑 Ban semi-automatics. 🛑 Charge premium permit fees for the rest. If you can't afford the responsibility, you don't need the firepower. It's time to price violence out of the market. #GunSafety

If you can wait 30 days for a passport or a couch delivery, you can wait 30 days for a firearm. It’s time to close the gun show loophole, pass universal background checks, and enact red flag laws. Common sense shouldn't be controversial. #EndGunViolence #GunSafetyNow

@SenatorDoe The "law-abiding citizen" argument falls apart when loopholes let anyone bypass the rules. We need comprehensive background checks on EVERY sale, a 30-day cooling-off period, and red flag laws to intervene before tragedy strikes. The status quo is costing lives. 🛑

"It's about safety, not seizure." Exactly. 👏 Closing the gun show loophole + comprehensive checks + a 30-day wait isn't tyranny; it's basic responsibility. If you're a safe owner, red flag laws won't hurt you, but they might save your neighbor. #GunReform #SafetyFirst

The 2nd Amendment isn’t about hunting; it’s the ultimate check and balance designed to protect our other freedoms. Keep current laws in place and stop eroding constitutional rights. Enforce what we have instead of creating new bans. #2A #Constitution #ShallNotBeInfringed

@AntiGunActivist Respectfully disagree. Punishing millions of law-abiding owners for the actions of criminals doesn't make anyone safer. The data shows that strict enforcement of existing laws is the answer, not more restrictions on rights. Protecting #2A is non-negotiable.

"The right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed." It’s written plainly for a reason. Responsible ownership is part of our heritage and safety. We don't need new legislation; we need to respect the Bill of Rights. 🇺🇸🔫 #GunRights #SecondAmendment #USA

It's time for national reciprocity. Your right to self-defense shouldn't disappear when you cross a state line. End the patchwork laws, abolish "gun-free" zones that only disarm victims, and let trained teachers protect our kids. Shall-issue is the only way forward. #2A #ShallIssue

@GunSafetyNow Stopping law-abiding citizens from carrying doesn't stop criminals, it just creates soft targets. We need to empower mentally healthy adults to carry everywhere—including schools. When seconds count, the police are minutes away. Arm the willing. #ConcealedCarry #2A

Replying to @NewsOutlet: The solution isn't more restrictions, it's removing the barriers for good people. Minimize the red tape on training, standardize shall-issue across all 50 states, and let educators defend their classrooms. Deterrence works better than signs. #SelfDefense #2A #GunRights

Shall not be infringed means SHALL NOT BE INFRINGED. It doesn’t mean “unless the government wants a list” or “unless the barrel is short.” Repeal the NFA, abolish the ATF, and restore the absolute right to self-defense. No lists. No permits. Total freedom. #2A #RepealTheNFA

@AntiGunLobby You claim safety requires control, but history shows safety requires parity. A free people shouldn't ask permission to own standard defense tools or carry them. The government has no business knowing what’s in my safe or on my hip. Constitutional Carry nationwide now.

If I can buy it, I should be able to carry it. Anywhere. Period. The NFA is an unconstitutional relic that turns law-abiding citizens into felons over paperwork errors. It’s time to shred the registry and legalize true ownership. Your rights don't end at state lines. #GunRights

Imagine if every able-bodied adult was trained and armed as a civic duty. Crime would plummet overnight because soft targets wouldn't exist anymore. An armed society is a polite society, but a mandated armed society is a safe one. It’s time to make defense a requirement. #2A

Replying to @GunSafetyNow: You argue for fewer guns, but Switzerland proves the opposite works. If we made gun ownership & training a mandatory civic duty like jury duty, we wouldn't just be exercising a right—we’d be securing the nation from the inside out. Responsible power to the people. 🇺🇸

We mandate jury duty. We mandate taxes. Why don't we mandate the tools to protect our communities? Mandatory firearm ownership for every capable adult would turn the entire citizenry into the ultimate deterrent against tyranny and crime. It’s not just a right, it’s a responsibility.
To own a gun is a fundamental American right. Anyone who tries to take it away is acting like a traitor. @Bill_Gates needs to wake up to this truth! #SecondAmendment #GunRights

Reply to @ConcernedMom: "You're calling us traitors? We're just protecting our homes! If anyone opposes unrestricted gun ownership, they deserve execution for treason. Wake up, America! #1A #ProtectTheRight"
Freedom means owning your own weapon. Those who say otherwise are literal traitors ready for execution. Join the fight! @Trump @Gop #GunFreedom #Treason
